query:
SELECT 'total_hands' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM hands
UNION ALL SELECT 'reviewed_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE reviewed = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'seed_demo_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE id IN (1380001,1380003,1380005,1380007,1380009)
UNION ALL SELECT 'test_tagged_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'total_leaks', COUNT(*) FROM leaks
UNION ALL SELECT 'test_leak_entries', COUNT(*) FROM leaks WHERE name = 'Test Leak'
UNION ALL SELECT 'handLeaks_rows', COUNT(*) FROM handLeaks;
command:

UNION ALL SELECT 'reviewed_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE reviewed = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'seed_demo_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE id IN (1380001,1380003,1380005,1380007,1380009)
UNION ALL SELECT 'test_tagged_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'total_leaks', COUNT(*) FROM leaks
UNION ALL SELECT 'test_leak_entries', COUNT(*) FROM leaks WHERE name = 'Test Leak'
UNION ALL SELECT 'handLeaks_rows', COUNT(*) FROM handLeaks;
